unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Calendar and Reminders
drDigitalIntro: The Calendar app keeps track of appointments and events. Create a new event, set a date and time, and it appears on your calendar. Reminders app is for tasks and to-do lists — check them off when complete. Both sync across your devices. Use them together: an appointment goes on Calendar, to-do items go in Reminders.
drDigitalHint: Set reminders so you don't forget important events.
